mapper.select: SELECT t.task_id AS taskId, t.task_type AS taskType, t.task_name AS title, t.task_desc AS subtitle, t.is_required AS isRequired, IF(r.record_id IS NOT NULL, 1, 0) AS isDone FROM t_plan_task t LEFT JOIN t_user_task_record r ON t.task_id = r.task_id AND r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_done = 1 WHERE t.plan_id = #{planId} AND t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.sort_order ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_plan_task WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND is_required = 1 AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_plan_task t INNER JOIN t_user_task_record r ON t.task_id = r.task_id WHERE t.plan_id = #{planId} AND t.is_required = 1 AND t.is_deleted = 0 AND r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_done = 1
SELECT task_type FROM t_plan_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT task_id AS taskId, task_type AS taskType, task_name AS taskName, task_desc AS taskDesc, task_url AS taskUrl, duration, is_required AS isRequired, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM t_plan_task WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT task_id FROM t_plan_task WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_plan_task ( plan_id, task_type, task_name, task_desc, task_url, duration, is_required, sort_order, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{taskType}, #{taskName}, #{taskDesc}, #{taskUrl}, #{duration}, #{isRequired}, #{sortOrder}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_plan_task
task_type = #{taskType},
task_name = #{taskName},
task_desc = #{taskDesc},
task_url = #{taskUrl},
duration = #{duration},
is_required = #{isRequired},
sort_order = #{sortOrder},
WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE t_plan_task SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE task_id IN
#{taskId}
